pageContext.name: Bo-Katan Kryze 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: The fourth release in The Mandalorian™ Classic Coin Collection features the legendary Mandalorian warrior, Bo-Katan Kryze™.  Officially licensed, these splendid coins are finely engraved and showcase Bo-Katan™ in her Mandalorian™ armor against the deck of Imperial Freighter™ in the background. As legal tender coins, the obverse simply bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II and a Certificate of Authenticity sits within the coin case.   All the coins arrive in a high-quality case placed inside a Star Wars™ themed box. Inside, you will find the coin's unique number in the mintage — just 5000 coins for the 1oz silver!   Don't miss out on the opportunity to grab one of these unique collectibles. Order today!
